edgms:educationalDigitalGame.dcterms:title: Prodigy Math
edgms:educationalDigitalGame.dcterms:creator: SMARTeacher
edgms:educationalDigitalGame.dcterms:description: Prodigy Math is a fantasy-themed role-playing game in which students answer curriculum-aligned math questions to progress through battles, quests, and storylines. It is designed for elementary and middle school mathematics practice through adaptive math questions and game-based progression.
edgms:educationalDigitalGame.dcterms:subject: Mathematics
edgms:educationalDigitalGame.edgms:learningObjective: Students will be able to practice and reinforce arithmetic, fractions, and algebraic thinking through adaptive gameplay.
